forager.model.object.ressource

Class Ressource

  • java.lang.Object
    • forager.model.FixedObject
      • forager.model.object.Harvestable
        • forager.model.object.ressource.Ressource
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    QuadTreeElement
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Food

    public abstract class Ressource
extends Harvestable

      • Ressource

        public Ressource(Environnement env,
         Rectangle hitbox,
         int quantity)
        Create a new ressource from its hitbox.
        Parameters:
        env - The environnement where it belongs.
        hitbox - The hitbox.
        quantity - The initial quantity of ressource.

      • harvest

        public int harvest(AgentEntity ae,
          String type)
        Description copied from class: Harvestable
        Harvest the entity by an agent.
        Specified by:
        harvest in class Harvestable
        Parameters:
        ae - The harvester.
        type - The type of ressource to harvest.
        Returns:
        The quantity harvested.

      • hasType

        public boolean hasType(String type)
        Description copied from class: Harvestable
        Test if the harvestable contain the given type.
        Specified by:
        hasType in class Harvestable
        Parameters:
        type - The ressource type.
        Returns:
        True if this contain that ressource, else false.
